content: Look alive, choom — Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming your way this Fall! Gear up for a return to the world of Cyberpunk, where only the ruthless survive and one wrong move can get you flatlined. This standalone story throws a fresh cast of characters into the darkest corners of Night City and brings a raw, gritty take on the world of the future. Lawless and unforgiving, this is Night City at its most brutal. Brought to you by CD PROJEKT RED and TRIGGER, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, SSSS.Gridman), with Kanno Ichigo (Promare, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) as the lead designer and Hugo Award winner Bartosz Sztybor as showrunner, story writer, and producer. TRAILER MUSIC Original Score by Tsuneo Imahori “You Can't Run From Me” — written by Maria Kelly and Drew Polovick, performed by Rico Nasty, produced by Drew Polovick, mixed and mastered by Elliot Polokoff Coming to Netflix, Fall 2026. Stay connected: cyberpunk.net/edgerunners2 x.com/edgerunners facebook.com/edgerunners instagram.com/Edgerunners Want to experience Night City on a deeper level? Play Cyberpunk 2077 and carve your own path through the dark future.
chineseContent: 充满活力，呼呼——《赛博朋克：Edgerunners 2》将于今年秋季与您见面！准备好重返赛博朋克世界，只有残酷的人才能生存，一个错误的举动就会让你陷入困境。这个独立的故事将一群新鲜的角色带入了夜之城最黑暗的角落，并为未来世界带来了原始、坚韧的视角。无法无天、无情无义，这是夜之城最残酷的地方。 《赛博朋克：Edgerunners 2》由 CD PROJEKT RED 和 TRIGGER 为您带来，由 Kai Ikarashi（《赛博朋克：Edgerunners》、《SSSS.Gridman》）执导，菅野一护（《Promare》、《赛博朋克：Edgerunners》）担任首席设计师，雨果奖得主 Bartosz Sztybor 担任剧集主管、故事编剧和制片人。预告片音乐 原声由今堀恒雄创作的《你不能逃离我》 — 由 Maria Kelly 和 Drew Polovick 创作，由 Rico Nasty 演唱，由 Drew Polovick 制作，由 Elliot Polokoff 混音和母带制作，将于 2026 年秋季登陆 Netflix。保持联系：cyberpunk.net/edgerunners2 x.com/edgerunners facebook.com/edgerunners instagram.com/Edgerunners 想要更深层次地体验夜之城吗？畅玩《赛博朋克 2077》，在黑暗的未来中开辟自己的道路。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
